evals.prompt: Show me a complete example of building an e-commerce catalog in Directus from scratch
evals.expected_output: Full explore-build-populate workflow with MCP tool calls
expectations: Creates collections in correct dependency order
Includes products, categories, and variants collections at minimum
Shows MCP tool call JSON examples

evals.prompt: I need to see what a typical Directus MCP tool call looks like — give me concrete JSON examples
evals.expected_output: Concrete JSON for schema, items, collections/fields tools
expectations: Shows schema tool JSON (discovery mode with empty input)
Shows items tool JSON with action and query
Shows collections or fields tool JSON with create action
All examples include Tool name and Input format
Includes at least 4 different tool examples
